zh.lifeSummary: 當Eude Welles於1387年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，他的父親John Welles 5th Baron Welles35歲，母親Eleanor de Mowbray11384歲。他於1405年8月7日與Maud Greystoke在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1417年7月26日在英國薩默塞特威爾斯享年30歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eude Welles于1387年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，他的父亲John Welles 5th Baron Welles35岁，母亲Eleanor de Mowbray11384岁。他于1405年8月7日与Maud Greystoke在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1417年7月26日在英国薩默塞特威爾斯享年30岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Eude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Judas  , occasionally used in the New Testament and elsewhere to distinguish the apostle Jude (Judas Thaddaeus), to whom one of the Epistles in the New Testament is attributed, from the traitor Judas Iscariot. It is also borne by the central character in  Thomas Hardy's  gloomy novel Jude the Obscure (  1895 ), a film adaptation of which was released in  1996 . The  Lennon  and  McCartney  song ‘Hey Jude’ (  1968 ) and the British actor  Jude Law  (  b. 1972 ) may have contributed to the popularity of the name in recent times. As a girl's name it is a short form of   Judith   or   Judy  , and is sometimes used independently.

en.lifeSummary: When Eude Welles was born in 1387, in Lincolnshire, England, his father, John Welles 5th Baron Welles, was 35 and his mother, Eleanor de Mowbray, was 11384. He married Maud Greystoke on 7 August 1405, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 26 July 1417, in Wells, Somerset, England, at the age of 30, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eude Welles est né en 1387, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, John Welles 5th Baron Welles, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Eleanor de Mowbray, avait 11384 ans. Il a épousé Maud Greystoke le 7 août 1405, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 26 juillet 1417, à Wells, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eude Welles 1387 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Welles 5th Baron Welles 35 und seine Mutter Eleanor de Mowbray 11384. Er hat am 7. August 1405 in Lincolnshire, England Maud Greystoke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 26. Juli 1417 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Wells, Somerset, England und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eude Welles è nato il nel 1387 nel Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, John Welles 5th Baron Welles, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor de Mowbray, aveva 11384 anni. Lui sposato Maud Greystoke il 7 agosto 1405, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1417, nel Wells, Somerset, England, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Eude Wellesが1387年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父John Welles 5th Baron Wellesは35歳，母Eleanor de Mowbrayは11384歳であった。1405年8月7日にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMaud Greystokeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1417年7月26日にイギリスソメルセトウエルズで30歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eude Welles(이)가 1387년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Welles 5th Baron Welles(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor de Mowbray(은)는 11384세였다. 그는 1405년 8월 7일 영국 링코실르에서 Maud Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1417년 7월 26일 영국 서머세트 웰스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eude Welles nasceu em 1387, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Welles 5th Baron Welles, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor de Mowbray, tinha 11384 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud Greystoke em 7 de agosto de 1405, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 26 de julho de 1417, em Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eude Welles родился в 1387 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Welles 5th Baron Welles было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor de Mowbray, 11384. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud Greystoke 7 августа 1405 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 26 июля 1417 г. в местности веллс, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eude Welles nació en 1387, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Welles 5th Baron Welles, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Eleanor de Mowbray, tenía 11384 años. Se casó con Maud Greystoke el 7 de agosto de 1405, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1417, en Wells, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
